query: i just finished building the webhook dispatcher in src/webhooks/ and want to make sure i didn't leave any untested paths before merging. can you check what's missing?
we're about to do a big refactor of the auth module. before we start breaking things, scan lua/myapp/auth/ and tell me what behaviors don't have tests covering them
find test gaps in internal/git/. I want br tasks for each module that needs work so I can plan a test sprint
what's untested in the billing package? I keep finding bugs there and I suspect we're missing edge case tests for the invoice calculations and discount logic
can you look at src/api/handlers/ and tell me which functions don't have corresponding test cases? I want to know the gaps before we ship v2
check test coverage for the state management module at lib/state/. we shipped it last week and I'm worried some error paths aren't tested
I need to improve tests for our parser. It's at packages/parser/src/ and the tests are in packages/parser/__tests__/. Can you find what's not covered and create issues for what needs fixing?
are there any test gaps in the sorting algorithm implementation? it's in main/lua/sort/sort.lua and the tests are in main/tests/sort_spec.lua
we just shipped a new feature and a few of the integration tests are failing with timeout errors. can you look into it?
our test suite has 90% coverage but we keep finding bugs in production. I think the tests themselves are garbage — lots of mocks testing mocks. can you audit the test quality?
write tests for the validateInput function in src/validators.ts. It should handle empty strings, null, and objects with missing required fields
I want to add a caching layer to our API. The endpoints are in src/api/ and we're thinking Redis. Can you help design this?
the login endpoint returns 500 when the password has unicode characters. here's the stack trace: TypeError at auth.ts:42
fix the flaky test in tests/auth_spec.lua — it passes locally but fails in CI about 30% of the time
can you review this PR? it changes the payment processing flow and I want to make sure nothing looks off. the diff is at github.com/myorg/myapp/pull/147
I need to refactor the database module — it's gotten too big and has too many responsibilities. Can you help me figure out how to split it up?
run the test suite for the auth module and tell me if anything fails. I just changed the token validation logic
our tests are really slow — the full suite takes 12 minutes. can you help figure out why and speed them up?
